options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: RandomizeDreamers
options.description:
Allow for Dreamers to be randomized into the item pool and opens their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 4 locations.

options.name: RandomizeSkills
options.description:
Allow for Skills, such as Mantis Claw or Shade Soul, to be randomized into the item pool. Also opens their locations
    for receiving randomized items.
    This option adds approximately 18 locations.

options.name: RandomizeFocus
options.description:
Removes the ability to focus and randomizes it into the item pool.
    This option adds approximately 1 location.

options.name: RandomizeSwim
options.description:
Removes the ability to swim in water and randomizes it into the item pool.
    This option adds approximately 0 locations.

options.name: RandomizeCharms
options.description:
Allow for Charms to be randomized into the item pool and open their locations for randomization. Includes Charms
    sold in shops.
    This option adds approximately 45 locations.

options.name: RandomizeKeys
options.description:
Allow for Keys to be randomized into the item pool. Includes those sold in shops.
    This option adds approximately 13 locations.

options.name: RandomizeMaskShards
options.description:
Allow for Mask Shard to be randomized into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 16 locations.

options.name: RandomizeVesselFragments
options.description:
Allow for Vessel Fragments to be randomized into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 9 locations.

options.name: RandomizeCharmNotches
options.description:
Allow for Charm Notches to be randomized into the item pool. Includes those sold by Salubra.
    This option adds approximately 9 locations.

options.name: RandomizePaleOre
options.description:
Randomize Pale Ores into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 6 locations.

options.name: RandomizeGeoChests
options.description:
Allow for Geo Chests to contain randomized items, as well as their Geo reward being randomized into the item pool.
    This option adds approximately 8 locations.

options.name: RandomizeJunkPitChests
options.description:
Randomize the contents of junk pit chests into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 5 locations.

options.name: RandomizeRancidEggs
options.description:
Randomize Rancid Eggs into the item pool and open their locations for randomization
    This option adds approximately 20 locations.

options.name: RandomizeRelics
options.description:
Randomize Relics (King's Idol, et al.) into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 43 locations.

options.name: RandomizeWhisperingRoots
options.description:
Randomize the essence rewards from Whispering Roots into the item pool. Whispering Roots will now grant a randomized
    item when completed. This can be previewed by standing on the root.
    This option adds approximately 15 locations.

options.name: RandomizeBossEssence
options.description:
Randomize boss essence drops, such as those for defeating Warrior Dreams, into the item pool and open their locations
    for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 12 locations.

options.name: RandomizeGrubs
options.description:
Randomize Grubs into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 46 locations.

options.name: RandomizeMimics
options.description:
Randomize Mimic Grubs into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 4 locations.

options.name: RandomizeMaps
options.description:
Randomize Maps into the item pool. This causes Cornifer to give you a message allowing you to see and buy an item
    that is randomized into that location as well.
    This option adds approximately 15 locations.

options.name: RandomizeStags
options.description:
Randomize Stag Stations unlocks into the item pool as well as placing randomized items on the stag station bell/toll.
    This option adds approximately 11 locations.

options.name: RandomizeLifebloodCocoons
options.description:
Randomize Lifeblood Cocoon grants into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 8 locations.

options.name: RandomizeGrimmkinFlames
options.description:
Randomize Grimmkin Flames into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 10 locations.

options.name: RandomizeJournalEntries
options.description:
Randomize the Hunter's Journal as well as the findable journal entries into the item pool, and open their locations
    for randomization. Does not include journal entries gained by killing enemies.
    This option adds approximately 6 locations.

options.name: RandomizeNail
options.description:
Removes the ability to swing the nail left, right and up, and shuffles these into the item pool.
    This option adds approximately 0 locations.

options.name: RandomizeGeoRocks
options.description:
Randomize Geo Rock rewards into the item pool and open their locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 207 locations.

options.name: RandomizeBossGeo
options.description:
Randomize boss Geo drops into the item pool and open those locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 8 locations.

options.name: RandomizeSoulTotems
options.description:
Randomize Soul Refill items into the item pool and open the Soul Totem locations for randomization.
    This option adds approximately 59 locations.

options.name: RandomizeLoreTablets
options.description:
Randomize Lore items into the itempool, one per Lore Tablet, and place randomized item grants on the tablets themselves.
    You must still read the tablet to get the item.
    This option adds approximately 33 locations.

options.name: RandomizeElevatorPass
options.description:
Adds an Elevator Pass item to the item pool, which is then required to use the large elevators connecting
City of Tears to the Forgotten Crossroads and Resting Grounds.

options.name: PreciseMovement
options.description:
Places skips into logic which require extremely precise player movement, possibly without movement skills such as
    dash or claw.

options.name: ProficientCombat
options.description: Places skips into logic which require proficient combat, possibly with limited items.

options.name: BackgroundObjectPogos
options.description: Places skips into logic for locations which are reachable via pogoing off of background objects.

options.name: EnemyPogos
options.description: Places skips into logic for locations which are reachable via pogos off of enemies.

options.name: ObscureSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which are considered obscure enough that a beginner is not expected to know them.

options.name: ShadeSkips
options.description: Places shade skips into logic which utilize the player's shade for pogoing or damage boosting.

options.name: InfectionSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which are only possible after the crossroads become infected.

options.name: FireballSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which require the use of spells to reset fall speed while in mid-air.

options.name: SpikeTunnels
options.description: Places skips into logic which require the navigation of narrow tunnels filled with spikes.

options.name: AcidSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which require crossing a pool of acid without Isma's Tear, or water if swim is disabled.

options.name: DamageBoosts
options.description: Places skips into logic which require you to take damage from an enemy or hazard to progress.

options.name: DangerousSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which contain a high risk of taking damage.

options.name: DarkRooms
options.description: Places skips into logic which require navigating dark rooms without the use of the Lumafly Lantern.

options.name: ComplexSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which require intense setup or are obscure even beyond advanced skip standards.

options.name: DifficultSkips
options.description: Places skips into logic which are considered more difficult than typical.

options.name: RemoveSpellUpgrades
options.description: Removes the second level of all spells from the item pool.

options.name: StartLocation
options.description: Choose your start location. This is currently only locked to King's Pass.

options.name: Goal
options.description: The goal required of you in order to complete your run in Archipelago.

options.name: GrubHuntGoal
options.description:
The amount of grubs required to finish Grub Hunt.
On 'All' any grubs from item links replacements etc. will be counted

options.name: WhitePalace
options.description:
Whether or not to include White Palace or not. Note: Even if excluded, the King Fragment check may still be
required if charms are vanilla.

options.name: ExtraPlatforms
options.description: Places additional platforms to make traveling throughout Hallownest more convenient.

options.name: AddUnshuffledLocations
options.description:
Adds non-randomized locations to the location pool, which allows syncing
of location state with co-op or automatic collection via collect.

Note: This will increase the number of location checks required to purchase
hints to the total maximum.

options.name: StartingGeo
options.description: The amount of starting geo you have.

options.name: DeathLink
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: DeathLinkShade
options.description:
Sets whether to create a shade when you are killed by a DeathLink and how to handle your existing shade, if any.

vanilla: DeathLink deaths function like any other death and overrides your existing shade (including geo), if any.
shadeless: DeathLink deaths do not spawn shades. Your existing shade (including geo), if any, is untouched.
shade: DeathLink deaths spawn a shade if you do not have an existing shade. Otherwise, it acts like shadeless.

* This option has no effect if DeathLink is disabled.
** Self-death shade behavior is not changed; if a self-death normally creates a shade in vanilla, it will override
    your existing shade, if any.

options.name: DeathLinkBreaksFragileCharms
options.description:
Sets if fragile charms break when you are killed by a DeathLink.

* This option has no effect if DeathLink is disabled.
** Self-death fragile charm behavior is not changed; if a self-death normally breaks fragile charms in vanilla, it
    will continue to do so.

options.name: MinimumGeoPrice
options.description: The minimum geo price for items in geo shops.

options.name: MaximumGeoPrice
options.description: The maximum geo price for items in geo shops.

options.name: MinimumGrubPrice
options.description: The minimum grub price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Grubfather.

options.name: MaximumGrubPrice
options.description: The maximum grub price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Grubfather.

options.name: MinimumEssencePrice
options.description: The minimum essence price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Seer.

options.name: MaximumEssencePrice
options.description: The maximum essence price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Seer.

options.name: MinimumCharmPrice
options.description:
The minimum charm price in the range of prices that an item should cost for Salubra's shop item which also
carry a charm cost.

options.name: MaximumCharmPrice
options.description:
The maximum charm price in the range of prices that an item should cost for Salubra's shop item which also
carry a charm cost.

options.name: RandomCharmCosts
options.description:
Total Notch Cost of all Charms together. Vanilla sums to 90.
This value is distributed among all charms in a random fashion.
Special Cases:
Set to -1 or vanilla for vanilla costs.
Set to -2 or shuffle to shuffle around the vanilla costs to different charms.

options.name: PlandoCharmCosts
options.description:
Allows setting a Charm's Notch costs directly, mapping {name: cost}.
This is set after any random Charm Notch costs, if applicable.

options.name: MinimumEggPrice
options.description:
The minimum rancid egg price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Jiji.
Only takes effect if the EggSlotShops option is greater than 0.

options.name: MaximumEggPrice
options.description:
The maximum rancid egg price in the range of prices that an item should cost from Jiji.
Only takes effect if the EggSlotShops option is greater than 0.

options.name: EggShopSlots
options.description: For each slot, add a location to the Egg Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: SlyShopSlots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Sly Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: SlyKeyShopSlots
options.description:
For each extra slot, add a location to the Sly Shop (requiring Shopkeeper's Key) and a filler item to the item
pool.

options.name: IseldaShopSlots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Iselda Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: SalubraShopSlots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Salubra Shop, and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: SalubraCharmShopSlots
options.description:
For each extra slot, add a location to the Salubra Shop (requiring Charms), and a filler item to the item
pool.

options.name: LegEaterShopSlots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Leg Eater Shop and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: GrubfatherRewardSlots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Grubfather and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: SeerRewardSlots
options.description: For each extra slot, add a location to the Seer and a filler item to the item pool.

options.name: ExtraShopSlots
options.description:
For each extra slot, add a location to a randomly chosen shop a filler item to the item pool.

The Egg Shop will be excluded from this list unless it has at least one item.

Shops are capped at 16 items each.

options.name: SplitCrystalHeart
options.description: Splits the Crystal Heart into left- and right-only versions of the item.

options.name: SplitMothwingCloak
options.description:
Splits the Mothwing Cloak into left- and right-only versions of the item. Randomly adds a second left or
right Mothwing cloak item which functions as the upgrade to Shade Cloak.

options.name: SplitMantisClaw
options.description: Splits the Mantis Claw into left- and right-only versions of the item.

options.name: CostSanity
options.description:
If enabled, most locations with costs (like stag stations) will have randomly determined costs.
If set to shopsonly, CostSanity will only apply to shops (including Grubfather, Seer and Egg Shop).
If set to notshops, CostSanity will only apply to non-shops (e.g. Stag stations and Cornifer locations)

These costs can be in Geo (except Grubfather, Seer and Eggshop), Grubs, Charms, Essence and/or Rancid Eggs

options.name: CostSanityHybridChance
options.description: The chance that a CostSanity cost will include two components instead of one, e.g. Grubs + Essence

options.name: CostSanityEggWeight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Egg cost. Chosen as a sum of all weights from other types.

options.name: CostSanityGrubWeight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Grub cost. Chosen as a sum of all weights from other types.

options.name: CostSanityEssenceWeight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Essence cost. Chosen as a sum of all weights from other types.

options.name: CostSanityCharmWeight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Charm cost. Chosen as a sum of all weights from other types.

options.name: CostSanityGeoWeight
options.description: The likelihood of Costsanity choosing a Geo cost. Chosen as a sum of all weights from other types.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
